Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FORTRESS PROPERTY GROUP, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff Fortress Property Group's motion for summary judgment. Appearances: Catherine Lui, Esq., and Karen G. Johnson-McKewan, Esq. of Orrick, (415) 773-5801, appearing for cross defendant Carbon Capital; Steven M. Morger, Esq. of Wendel Rosen Black & Dean, LLP, (510) 834-6600; appearing for defendant Stephen E. Block, and Dale Forrest Block Living Trust, and opposing party; Tara L. Condon, of the Lembi Group Legal Department, (415) 252-4241, appearing for Defendant Trophy Properties, LLC, and Cross-Defefendant Trophy Properties XIII, LLC, and opposing party; George M. Lee, Esq. of Seiler Epstein Ziegler & Applegate, LLP, (415) 979-0500, appearing for plaintiff and moving party; Hearing held and argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied as to all defendants. Plaintiff fails to shift the burden of proof. (Two Orders signed and filed regarding evidentiary objections. Copies given to counsel present in Court at hearing.) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Text Ruling

Cross defendant Carlson Capital's motion for summary adjudication as to the slander of title and intentional interference with contractual relations causes of action. Appearances: Catherine Lui, Esq,and Karen G. Johnson-McKewan, Esq. of Orrick, (415) 773-5801, appearing for Cross-Defendant Carbon Capital and moving party, Steven M. Morger, Esq. of Wendel Rosen Black & Dean, LLP, (510) 834-6600; appearing for defendant Stephen E. Block and Dale Forrest Block Living Trust; and opposing party. No other appearances. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. (Two Orders signed and filed regarding evidentiary objections. Copies given to counsel present in Court at hearing.)
